name: Showdown
description: Showdown missions are high pressure climactic missions executed with the intent of permanently striking down a Nemesis, a singular capable, highly dangerous and relentless opponent.
pcVictory: The sitrep ends immediately once the Nemesis NPC is eliminated.
enemyVictory: All PCs are defeated, or the PCs do not eliminate the Nemesis NPC by the end of round 6.
objective: The PCs are tasked with taking out the Nemesis NPC in this sitrep. It is an NPC that is sporting the Nemesis template + Ultra template (Lancer Core Rulebook pg. 330.)
deployment: The GM deploys first in the EDZ, and then deploys the Nemesis NPC at the back of the EDZ; the PCs deploy next, choosing positions for their characters within the ADZ.

name: Smash the Symbol
description: Smash the Symbol is an evocative sitrep that can either be a firestarter or finale mission in its own right it can signify the beginning or end cap an ordeal or campaign against a ruthless OpFor. It involves the PC Squad pushing into contested territory and taking out a singular massive Monument that consolidates the physical influence of the OpFor.
pcVictory: The sitrep ends if the Monument* is destroyed and the PCs occupy the Control Zone in front of the Monument.
enemyVictory: All PCs are defeated, or the PCs do not destroy the Monument and control the Control Zone by the end of round 8.
objective: The PCs are tasked with destroying a significant Monument belonging to the OpFor that signifies their influence or control. Additionally, the PCs are required as well to occupy the Control Zone in front of the Monument by the end of Round 8.
deployment: The GM should prepare about two times the enemy forces that they would normally use. With half beginning on the field deployed in equal amounts on both EDZ and – the other half all held as Reinforcements.
